source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.10 (1,1,1,10)
distilled_thesis: The cup is the vessel-symbol that gathers, overflows, empties, and parallels Zarathustra's own motion.
